name: Ministral 3B / 8B (24.10)
metaDescription: Ministral 3B / 8B (24.10) (Mistral AI), released 2024-10-09 — part of the Ministral line. First-generation edge models at 3B and 8B (ministral-3b/8b-2410).
overview: Ministral 3B / 8B (24.10) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Ministral line. Released 2024-10-09. Tiny dense edge models for on-device, laptop and drone deployment.
What's notable in this version: First-generation edge models at 3B and 8B (ministral-3b/8b-2410).
